messages.text: I'm here and listening. Please continue.
I'm here and listening. Please continue.

Welcome! I'm here to help preserve your language and stories. To begin, could you please tell me your name, the language or dialect you speak, your approximate age, and your consent level for sharing this recording? (You can choose from public, researcher, community, family, or restricted.)
There is a secret ceremony only elders know about

Thank you for sharing that. I understand there are sacred traditions you wish to protect. All of your stories will be handled with the utmost respect and privacy.

To ensure I can preserve your heritage accurately and appropriately, could you please share your name, the language or dialect you speak, your approximate age, and your consent level for sharing this recording? (You can choose from public, researcher, community, family, or restricted.)
